_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/Makefile.am.planningNote: Autotools build manifest. C-artifact per PLANNING.md §4 (Makefile.am -> none). The hunk only removes cswdel.c/cswdest.c/cswmdel.c from the source list (the C heap-free files deleted in v41). digiTS has no build manifest analogue.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/csw.c.planningNote: IFparm instance/model param tables (CSWpTable, CSWmPTable), CSWnames terminal names, and the NUMELEMS/sizeof size globals. Param-table content maps to CurrentControlledSwitchDefinition.modelRegistry paramDefs; the size globals are C plumbing. Both hunks are pure whitespace/alignment reformat with no token/semantic delta in v41 — go hunk by hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswacld.c.planningNote: AC small-signal load (AC implemented per analysis-scope.md). digiTS CSW has no explicit stampAc; the same conductance stamp is reused from load() (cswacld.c is the DC conductance re-stamped at the AC operating point). v41 hunks are the GENmodel-iteration refactor + Ptr-casing rename, both mirrored by the element's load() loop/handles.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswask.c.planningNote: Instance-parameter getter (control name, pos/neg node, switch current, instantaneous power). Query-path / property-bag surface. Current/power computation (V*Gcond) corresponds to getPinCurrents(); the AC-guard error paths and node/uid getters have no digiTS query counterpart. Hunks are reformat-only; resolve per hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswdefs.h.planningNote: Per PLANNING.md §4 Header note: struct-field/macro change maps to the StatePool slot schema + instance fields + constants, not a method body. CSWinstance/CSWmodel fields -> CSW_SCHEMA slots + element private fields; CSWswitchstate/CSWctrlvalue state-offset macros -> SLOT_CSW_STATE/(ctrlvalue); CSW_NUM_STATES=2 -> stateSize; param-ID enums -> param keys.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswdel.c.planningNote: Deleted in v41. CSWdelete walks the instance linked list and FREE()s the C struct. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4 (del/dest/mdel -> none; JS is GC'd).

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswdest.c.planningNote: Deleted in v41. CSWdestroy FREE()s the model+instance lists. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4; JS is GC'd.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswext.h.planningNote: Prototype header — extern declarations of the CSW dispatch functions. C-language prototype plumbing per PLANNING.md §4; no data or behavioral content. The hunk only reformats decls and drops the CSWdelete/CSWdestroy/CSWmDelete protos for the deleted files.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswinit.c.planningNote: SPICEdev CSWinfo registration struct. Registration glue per PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note — examine the hunk: it converts to C99 designated initializers AND nulls DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete/DEVdelete (the deleted del/dest/mdel files). Both facts are C dispatch plumbing; digiTS registers via registry.register(CurrentControlledSwitchDefinition).

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswinit.h.planningNote: extern declarations of CSWpTable/CSWmPTable/CSWnames and size globals. C-language prototype plumbing per PLANNING.md §4; whitespace-only hunk (removes the spaces inside []). No behavioral content.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswload.c.planningNote: DC/transient load: switch-state decision (4-state REALLY_OFF/ON, HYST_OFF/ON), conductance selection, 2x2 conductance stamp. Line-for-line counterpart is CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement.load() (the file comment cites cswload.c:107-136). v41 hunks: GENmodel-iteration refactor, CKTstate0/1 indexing via CSWswitchstate, the commented-out CSWctrlvalue store (FIXME), Ptr-casing rename.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswmask.c.planningNote: Model-parameter getter (RON/ROFF/ITH/IHYS/GON/GOFF readback). Query-path surface; maps to the element's private model fields (_ron/_roff/derived iT/iH/conductances). No standalone digiTS model-ask method. Hunks are reformat-only; resolve per hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswmdel.c.planningNote: Deleted in v41. CSWmDelete cuts a model out of the linked list and FREE()s it. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4; JS is GC'd.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswmpar.c.planningNote: Model-parameter application: RON->onConduct=1/R, ROFF->offConduct=1/R, ITH, IHYS, plus *Given flags. The R->G reciprocal and threshold/hyst storage map to the element constructor (Ron/Roff -> 1/Ron in load) and the iT/iH derivation; the *Given default-fill is in cswsetup. Param-application surface; resolve per hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswnoise.c.planningNote: Thermal-noise spectral-density evaluation (NevalSrc/Nintegrate). Noise analysis is NOT implemented in digiTS per analysis-scope.md (no noise method on AnalogElement, no noise engine, no noise MCP tool). Whole-analysis NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5(b).

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswparam.c.planningNote: Instance-parameter application: CONTROL (controlling-source name), IC_ON/IC_OFF (CSWzero_stateGiven). control-name maps to _ctrlBranchLabel (ctrlBranch param); IC_ON/OFF maps to _closedInitial (closed param, mirrors CSWzero_stateGiven). Param-application surface; resolve per hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswpzld.c.planningNote: Pole-zero load. Pole-zero analysis is NOT implemented in digiTS per analysis-scope.md (no PZ method on AnalogEngine, no PZ engine, no PZ MCP tool). Whole-analysis NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5(b).

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswsetup.c.planningNote: setup(): model default-value fill (threshold/hyst/on/off conductances+resistances), state allocation (CSW_NUM_STATES), controlling-branch resolution (CKTfndBranch), and the 4-element TSTALLOC sequence. Counterpart is CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement.setup() (file cites cswsetup.c:48 and :59-62 line-for-line). v41 hunks: GENmodel-iteration refactor, TSTALLOC macro hoist, Ptr-casing rename.

src/spicelib/devices/csw/cswtrunc.c.planningNote: Transient truncation/timestep-limit contribution (transient implemented per analysis-scope.md). Counterpart is the element's transient load path. v41 hunks read CSWctrlvalue (state slot +1) which digiTS does NOT currently populate (the cswload.c CSWctrlvalue store is the commented-out FIXME and SLOT_CSW_STATE is the only live state) — see open question; the truncation method itself is PORT, the missing live ctrlvalue input is the gap to resolve.

csw/Makefile.am#h001.rationale: Autotools build manifest (C-artifact, PLANNING.md §4). Hunk only drops cswdel.c/cswdest.c/cswmdel.c (deleted C heap-free files) from the build source list. digiTS has no build-manifest analogue.

csw/csw.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CSW_PIN_LAYOUT (CSWnames terminal names) + element class size (CSWiSize/CSWmSize size globals have no JS counterpart but the terminal-name table does)

csw/cswacld.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement.load() (conductance stamp reused at AC operating point; no separate stampAc)

csw/cswask.c#h001.rationale: Instance-parameter ask getter (the per-device IFparm value-readback API: control name, pos/neg node, CSW_CURRENT, CSW_POWER, uid). digiTS has no per-device IFparm getter surface — instance readback goes through getPinCurrents(), a different mechanism, not a ported CSWask. Per the ratified #32/#33 precedent (instance-ask resask.c/mutask.c = NO-COUNTERPART; only model-ask getters that read a ported param stay PENDING as zero-delta). The CSW_CURRENT/CSW_POWER V*G computation is reachable via getPinCurrents but that is a semantic match via a different mechanism, not a line-isomorphic port of CSWask.

csw/cswask.c#h002.rationale: CSWask switch-statement body — the instance-parameter ask getter dispatch. Same basis as cswask.c#h001: digiTS has no per-device IFparm value-readback API; instance-ask = NO-COUNTERPART per the ratified #32/#33 precedent (resask.c/mutask.c).

csw/cswdefs.h#h001.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CSWinstance struct -> CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement private fields + CSW_SCHEMA slots

csw/cswdefs.h#h002.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CSW_SCHEMA (CSWswitchstate -> SLOT_CSW_STATE; CSW_NUM_STATES=2 -> stateSize) + state constants REALLY_OFF/ON/HYST_OFF/ON
csw/cswdefs.h#h002.functionGroup: csw/cswdefs.h::typedef struct sCSWmodel {      /* model structure for a switch */

csw/cswdefs.h#h003.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CSWmodel struct -> element private model fields (_ron/_roff + derived conductances) + param-ID enums -> param keys
csw/cswdefs.h#h003.functionGroup: csw/cswdefs.h::typedef struct sCSWmodel {      /* model structure for a switch */

csw/cswdel.c#h001.rationale: Deleted file. CSWdelete walks the instance linked list and FREE()s the C struct. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4; JS is GC'd, no instance-free path exists or is needed.

csw/cswdest.c#h001.rationale: Deleted file. CSWdestroy FREE()s the model+instance lists. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4; JS is GC'd.

csw/cswext.h#h001.rationale: Prototype header — extern declarations of CSW dispatch functions. C-language prototype plumbing (PLANNING.md §4); hunk reformats decls and drops the deleted del/dest/mdel protos. No data or behavioral content.

csw/cswinit.c#h001.rationale: SPICEdev registration struct converted to C99 designated initializers; the only non-cosmetic change is nulling DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete/DEVdelete (the deleted del/dest/mdel C heap-free files). C dispatch plumbing per PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note; digiTS registers via registry.register(CurrentControlledSwitchDefinition). The DEVload/DEVsetup/DEVtrunc/DEVacLoad/DEVpzLoad/DEVnoise function-pointer wiring is unchanged in v41 and carries no new behavioral fact (no new param slot, no changed default).

csw/cswinit.h#h001.rationale: extern declarations of CSWpTable/CSWmPTable/CSWnames + size globals. C prototype plumbing per PLANNING.md §4; whitespace-only hunk (removes spaces inside []). No behavioral content.

csw/cswload.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement.load() (state-decision branches + CSWswitchstate indexing + commented-out CSWctrlvalue FIXME + 2x2 stamp)

csw/cswmask.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement private model fields (_ron/_roff + derived iT/iH/conductances) read-back; no standalone model-ask method

csw/cswmask.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement private model fields (CSWmAsk switch body)

csw/cswmdel.c#h001.rationale: Deleted file. CSWmDelete cuts a model out of the linked list and FREE()s it. C heap free per PLANNING.md §4; JS is GC'd.

csw/cswmpar.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement constructor + load() (RON->1/Ron, ROFF->1/Roff, ITH/IHYS -> iT/iH derivation from pullInI/dropOutI)

csw/cswnoise.c#h001.rationale: Thermal-noise spectral-density evaluation (NevalSrc/Nintegrate, CSWnVar history). Noise analysis is NOT implemented in digiTS per analysis-scope.md (no noise method on AnalogElement, no noise engine under src/solver/analog/, no noise MCP tool). Whole-analysis NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5(b).

csw/cswparam.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/switching/current-controlled-switch.ts :: CurrentControlledSwitchAnalogElement constructor (_ctrlBranchLabel from ctrlBranch param; CSWparam preamble)

csw/cswpzld.c#h001.rationale: Pole-zero load. Pole-zero analysis is NOT implemented in digiTS per analysis-scope.md (no PZ method on AnalogEngine, no PZ engine, no PZ MCP tool). Whole-analysis NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5(b).

csw/cswpzld.c#h002.rationale: Pole-zero load body (CSWpzLoad). Pole-zero analysis is NOT implemented in digiTS per analysis-scope.md. Whole-analysis NO-COUNTERPART per PLANNING.md §5(b).

csw/cswtrunc.c#h001.functionGroup: csw/cswtrunc.c::Copyright 1990 Regents of the University of California.  All rights reserved.
csw/cswtrunc.c#h001.rationale: CSWtrunc is DORMANT in v41: cswload.c:132 leaves the controlling-current store behind a commented-out FIXME, so lastChange is always 0 and the truncation never fires. h001 is the header-comment removal. digiTS CurrentControlledSwitch has no getLteTimestep and CSW_SCHEMA has no ctrlvalue slot; the v41 truncation is bit-identical to no-truncation, so building it would be dead code.

csw/cswtrunc.c#h002.rationale: CSWtrunc function body. Dormant in v41 (cswload.c:132 FIXME disables the ctrlvalue store -> lastChange==0 always -> no timestep limit emitted). No digiTS counterpart (no truncation method, CSW_SCHEMA lacks a ctrlvalue slot). Omission is bit-identical to v41 behavior; NO-COUNTERPART per user ruling 2026-06-03.
